body_txt: A Casanova Wannabe with the added bonus of being conventionally attractive. Unfortunately, this may not apply to the rest of that person’s personality. The Handsome Lech is a shameless skirt chaser (even if his flirting is of the playful and charming kind). But when the more negative parts of this character’s personality become obvious (irresponsibility, fear of commitment, possible misogyny, possessiveness, immaturity , etc.), this will drive away potential suitors . These are almost guaranteed to have luck with the one character (who is attracted to him, if only in a Slap-Slap-Kiss way) willing to put up with these problems. If not, then Failure Is the Only Option . The Handsome Lech is more likely to be an Intentional Heartbreaker than average, but this isn't inherent. Compare and contrast Chivalrous Pervert and Predatory Pervert , both which this may or may not overlap with. While characters can be both if they are both charming and legitimately care about those they charm, frequently a work will contrast an awkward but sincere Chivalrous Pervert with the Man of Wealth and Taste charm of a Handsome Lech only interested in adding tally marks to his list of "conquests". If a character is both chivalrous and handsome, and contrasted with a plainly disgusting pervert who isn't even that attractive, Beauty Equals Goodness is in effect. If the Love Interest is of the more assertive type, she may flirt by using a Playful "Perv" Accusation . Also contrast the Kavorka Man , an unattractive male character who is quite successful with the ladies.
